overall.description: A nighttime rooftop campfire scene from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a group of characters gathered around a large bonfire with futuristic wind turbines and illuminated towers visible in the background. The scene features a teal and orange color palette with atmospheric lighting from the fire and distant city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop campfire gathering with industrial wind turbines

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the campfire gathering from a fixed position at the edge of the group

notable_agents.action: sitting in a folding chair near the fire, warming hands
standing and gesturing while conversing with seated group members

entered.detail: Large burning campfire with tall flames providing primary warm orange illumination against the cool blue night
Industrial wind turbine with three circular blades silhouetted against the night sky
Industrial wind turbine with three circular blades silhouetted against the night sky
Pair of tall futuristic towers with vertical blue lighting strips visible in the distant city skyline
Piles of junk, broken machinery, and discarded items scattered across the rooftop surface

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime view of a rooftop campfire scene where multiple characters gather around a large central bonfire. Industrial wind turbines frame the scene on both sides while illuminated futuristic towers rise in the distant background. Characters are seated in folding chairs or standing around the fire, engaging in conversation and relaxation. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the atmospheric interplay of warm firelight against the cool blue urban night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a nighttime rooftop gathering centered around a glowing bonfire. It begins by capturing a group of characters seated in folding chairs or standing in conversation, their forms illuminated by the warm flicker of the central fire. As the eye moves outward, the immediate warmth of the campfire contrasts with the cool blue tones of the urban night. The scene then expands to reveal industrial wind turbines framing the perimeter, before finally settling on the distant, illuminated futuristic towers that pierce the dark horizon.
